title: Simple Stations - Mason
description: Mod for configurable, compact and simple building blocks production stations
body:
**Simple Stations** mod provides you structures which can be used to automate building blocks production.

### **Excavation station**

Quickly produces: sand, clay, red sand, dirt, gravel or snow accordiing to the filter

### **Concrete mixing station**

Produces colored concrete in big batches from gravel, sand and dye

### **Blasting station**

Quickly produces big batches of glass, bricks, glazed and regular terracota  
Accepts dye to smelt dyed variants, required for glazed terracota

### **Sifting station**

Transforms big batches of sand, gravel, dirt, clay or soul sand into mob loot  
Can be boosted with lucky coin

### Features

*   Supports RF energy 
*   Configurable settings 
*   JEI compatibility
*   Supports fluid and item tubes
